visual_summary: RelatedComponents is a related UI component from the hyperui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready other component with the following characteristics:

Name: RelatedComponents
Description: RelatedComponents is a related UI component from the hyperui corpus. It provides reusable other behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: utility-styled
Interactions: animated, hover
Tags: hyperui, other, related

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
// src/components/RelatedComponents.astro
---
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content'

import { ArrowRight } from '@lucide/astro'

import ComponentCard from './ComponentCard.astro'

type Props = {
  slug: string
  terms: string[]
  category: 'application' | 'marketing' | 'neobrutalism'
}

const { slug, terms, category } = Astro.props

const termsSet = new Set(terms)

  .map(({ data }) => data)
  .filter((item) => item.slug !== slug && item
